strengths: 20+ years of full-stack technical depth across multiple domains—significantly exceeds 15-year requirement
Currently building AI infrastructure at Staff level (MCP generators and frameworks for agentic workflows)
10+ year stewardship of GISCollective platform—deployed at organizations like Green Map, demonstrates ability to architect and scale systems
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI—holds Computer Science Bachelor's only
AI experience focused on infrastructure and tooling rather than end-user products or services built with AI
No documented background in customer advisory or strategic consulting on cloud/AI adoption

key_factors.factor: Active AI Infrastructure Work at Staff Level
Platform Building and Entrepreneurial Track Record

response.justification: Szabo exceeds the experience requirement with 20 years of technical depth and is currently hands-on with AI infrastructure at Staff level—directly aligned with the role's focus. His decade-long stewardship of GISCollective and track record architecting systems at scale demonstrate technical vision and execution capability. While lacking formal AI credentials and customer-advisory background, his deep technical foundation and current AI infrastructure engagement position him to quickly master the strategic and consulting dimensions.
